items.question_en: Which RE tasks are reported in papers from more than one distinct venue?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?reTask ?reTaskLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?venue) AS ?venueCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181002 ?reTask ;
                orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
  OPTIONAL { ?reTask rdfs:label ?reTaskLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?reTask ?reTaskLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?venue) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?venueCount) ?reTaskLabel
items.notes: Compares RE-task coverage across venues rather than only listing tasks per paper.

items.question_en: Which publication years contain papers that report both an NLP task type and an extracted element?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?year (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
         orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181003 ?nlpTask .
  ?nlpTask orkgp:P181004 ?nlpTaskType ;
           orkgp:P181006 ?taskOutput .
  ?taskOutput orkgp:P181009 ?extractedElement .
}
GROUP BY ?year
ORDER BY ?year
items.notes: Uses publication year as the grouping axis for a nested NLP-task-output pattern.

items.question_en: Which papers report an NLP task output type but none of the specialized output annotations?
items.notes: Targets output nodes that only expose the generic output type and none of the specialized output annotations.

items.question_en: Which combinations of NLP task input and translation mapping cardinality are shared by at least two papers?
items.notes: Compares cross-paper reuse of one input-to-mapping-cardinality combination.

items.question_en: Which papers report either a classification label or an extracted element, but not both, and which one is reported?
items.notes: Uses an exclusive-or pattern over two different specialized output annotations.

items.question_en: Which papers report all four main contribution regions: an NLP task, an NLP dataset, an implemented approach, and an evaluation?
items.notes: Checks for complete multi-region contribution descriptions within one paper.

items.question_en: Which publication years contain papers that report a venue and an implemented approach but no NLP dataset?
items.notes: Targets a partial contribution bundle and groups it by publication year.

items.question_en: Which venues have papers that report an NLP dataset, an annotation process, and an evaluation?
items.notes: Aggregates a three-region contribution profile at the venue level.

items.question_en: Which papers report an RE task and an implemented approach but neither an NLP dataset nor an annotation process?
items.notes: Uses two absence constraints to isolate a sparse but method-oriented contribution profile.

items.question_en: Which papers report both a dataset location and a release, and in which venues are those papers published?
items.notes: Connects data-storage and release-reporting regions through the same contribution and venue.

items.question_en: Which papers report an implemented approach with documentation but no algorithm?
items.notes: Shifts methodology focus to documentation-first reporting rather than algorithm-first reporting.

items.question_en: Which papers report an implemented approach with both documentation and a methodology license type, but without any dependency?
items.notes: Combines present documentation and license evidence with absent dependency information.

items.question_en: Which dependencies are reported together with more than one distinct running requirement?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?dependency ?dependencyLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?runningRequirement) AS ?runningRequirementCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:P181048 ?dependency ;
                       orkgp:P181047 ?runningRequirement .
  OPTIONAL { ?dependency rdfs:label ?dependencyLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?dependency ?dependencyLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?runningRequirement) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?runningRequirementCount) ?dependencyLabel
items.notes: Aggregates methodology support requirements around the same dependency value.

items.question_en: Which combinations of algorithm and dependency are associated with more than one distinct approach type?
items.notes: Looks for one algorithm-dependency pairing that spans multiple approach-type values.

items.question_en: Which papers report both an NLP data abstraction level and public availability for the same dataset?
items.notes: Crosses dataset abstraction information with license-side availability information.

items.question_en: Which data source domains are associated with more than one distinct data source type?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?domain ?domainLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?sourceType) AS ?sourceTypeCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?dataSource .
  ?dataSource orkgp:P181020 ?domain ;
              orkgp:P181018 ?sourceType .
  OPTIONAL { ?domain rdfs:label ?domainLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?domain ?domainLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?sourceType) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?sourceTypeCount) ?domainLabel
items.notes: Finds source domains that are described through multiple different source-type values.

items.question_en: Which natural languages are paired with more than one distinct NLP data format?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?naturalLanguage ?naturalLanguageLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataFormat) AS ?formatCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType .
  ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?naturalLanguage ;
            orkgp:P181023 ?dataFormat .
  OPTIONAL { ?naturalLanguage rdfs:label ?naturalLanguageLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?naturalLanguage ?naturalLanguageLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataFormat) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?formatCount) ?naturalLanguageLabel
items.notes: Aggregates data-format variety for each reported dataset natural language.

items.question_en: Which papers report more than one distinct data source domain for the same dataset?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?domain) AS ?domainCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?dataSource .
  ?dataSource orkgp:P181020 ?domain .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?paper ?paperLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?domain) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?domainCount) ?paperLabel
items.notes: Compares per-paper breadth of dataset source-domain reporting.

items.question_en: Which papers report more than one distinct evaluation metric in the same evaluation?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?metric) AS ?metricCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?paper ?paperLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?metric) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?metricCount) ?paperLabel
items.notes: Counts metric diversity within one evaluation node instead of listing metrics one by one.

items.question_en: Which evaluation metrics are used with more than one distinct validation procedure?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?metric ?metricLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?validationProcedure) AS ?validationProcedureCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric ;
              orkgp:P181050 ?validationProcedure .
  OPTIONAL { ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?metric ?metricLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?validationProcedure) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?validationProcedureCount) ?metricLabel
items.notes: Compares how broadly each metric is paired with distinct validation procedures.

items.question_en: Which papers report a validation procedure and a baseline comparison type but no baseline comparison detail?
items.notes: Adds a validation-procedure requirement to a missing-baseline-detail pattern.

items.question_en: Which publication years contain papers that report both evaluation metrics and baseline comparison details?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?year (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
         orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric ;
              orkgp:P181051 ?baselineComparison .
  ?baselineComparison orkgp:P181053 ?baselineDetail .
}
GROUP BY ?year
ORDER BY ?year
items.notes: Groups richer evaluation reporting by publication year.

items.question_en: Which baseline comparison details are associated with more than one distinct baseline comparison type?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?baselineDetail (COUNT(DISTINCT ?baselineType) AS ?baselineTypeCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P181051 ?baselineComparison .
  ?baselineComparison orkgp:P181053 ?baselineDetail ;
                      orkgp:P181052 ?baselineType .
}
GROUP BY ?baselineDetail
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?baselineType) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?baselineTypeCount) ?baselineDetail
items.notes: Looks for one baseline-detail value that is reused with multiple baseline-type values.

items.question_en: Which venues contain papers that provide a release URL?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?venue ?venueLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P135046 ?venue ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P1003 ?releaseUrl .
  OPTIONAL { ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?venue ?venueLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?paperCount) ?venueLabel
items.notes: Aggregates release-URL provision at the venue level.

items.question_en: Which papers provide dependencies and release information but no running requirements?
items.notes: Reverses the usual running-requirement focus by looking for dependency-and-release reporting without it.

items.question_en: Which documentation types are associated with more than one distinct release format?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?documentationType ?documentationTypeLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?releaseFormat) AS ?releaseFormatCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:P41835 ?documentationType ;
                       orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P181049 ?releaseFormat .
  OPTIONAL { ?documentationType rdfs:label ?documentationTypeLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?documentationType ?documentationTypeLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?releaseFormat) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?releaseFormatCount) ?documentationTypeLabel
items.notes: Compares how one documentation type is paired with different release-format values.

items.question_en: Which papers provide an approach type, documentation, and a release, and what release formats do they use?
items.notes: Collects a richer released-resource profile tied to one implemented approach.

items.question_en: Which papers provide a methodology license type and documentation, but neither a release nor a dataset URL?
items.notes: Combines positive software-resource evidence with two different URL/release absence checks.

items.question_en: Which RE tasks are paired with more than one distinct evaluation metric?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?reTask ?reTaskLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?metric) AS ?metricCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181002 ?reTask ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  OPTIONAL { ?reTask rdfs:label ?reTaskLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?reTask ?reTaskLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?metric) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?metricCount) ?reTaskLabel
items.notes: Compares evaluation diversity across different RE-task values.

items.question_en: Which NLP task output types are paired with more than one distinct data source type across papers?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?outputType ?outputTypeLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?sourceType) AS ?sourceTypeCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181003 ?nlpTask ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?nlpTask orkgp:P181006 ?taskOutput .
  ?taskOutput orkgp:P181007 ?outputType .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?dataSource .
  ?dataSource orkgp:P181018 ?sourceType .
  OPTIONAL { ?outputType rdfs:label ?outputTypeLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?outputType ?outputTypeLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?sourceType) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?sourceTypeCount) ?outputTypeLabel
items.notes: Crosses task-output semantics with dataset-source semantics across papers.

items.question_en: Which approach types are used with more than one distinct dataset natural language across papers?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?approachType ?approachTypeLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?naturalLanguage) AS ?languageCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:P5043 ?approachType .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType .
  ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?naturalLanguage .
  OPTIONAL { ?approachType rdfs:label ?approachTypeLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?approachType ?approachTypeLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?naturalLanguage) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?languageCount) ?approachTypeLabel
items.notes: Compares methodology types against multilingual dataset usage.

items.question_en: Which venues report papers with more than one distinct baseline comparison type?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?venue ?venueLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?baselineType) AS ?baselineTypeCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P135046 ?venue ;
                orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P181051 ?baselineComparison .
  ?baselineComparison orkgp:P181052 ?baselineType .
  OPTIONAL { ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?venue ?venueLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?baselineType) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?baselineTypeCount) ?venueLabel
items.notes: Compares baseline-type diversity across venues.

items.question_en: Which evaluation metrics are reported both in papers with baseline comparisons and in papers without baseline comparisons?
items.notes: Requires the same metric value to appear in two different evaluation contexts across papers.

items.question_en: Which RE tasks are reported both in papers with dataset URLs and in papers without dataset URLs?
items.notes: Compares the same RE-task value across URL-rich and URL-absent dataset contexts.

items.question_en: Which validation procedures occur both with baseline comparison details and without them?
items.notes: Compares one validation-procedure value across detailed and non-detailed baseline settings.

items.question_en: Which data source domains occur in papers with annotation schemes and also in papers without annotation schemes?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?domain ?domainLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper1 orkgp:P31 ?contribution1 .
  ?contribution1 a orkgc:C121001 ;
                 orkgp:P181011 ?dataset1 ;
                 orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess1 .
  ?dataset1 orkgp:P181017 ?dataSource1 .
  ?dataSource1 orkgp:P181020 ?domain .
  ?annotationProcess1 orkgp:P181036 ?annotationScheme .

  ?paper2 orkgp:P31 ?contribution2 .
  ?contribution2 a orkgc:C121001 ;
                 orkgp:P181011 ?dataset2 .
  ?dataset2 orkgp:P181017 ?dataSource2 .
  ?dataSource2 orkgp:P181020 ?domain .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?contribution2 orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess2 .
    ?annotationProcess2 orkgp:P181036 ?otherAnnotationScheme .
  }

  OPTIONAL { ?domain rdfs:label ?domainLabel . }
}
ORDER BY ?domainLabel
items.notes: Tests whether the same source-domain value appears with and without annotation-scheme reporting.

items.question_en: Which publication years contain papers that use the same evaluation metric but different baseline comparison types?
items.notes: Compares baseline-type variation for the same metric within one publication year.

items.question_en: Which papers report either shared material or a fatigue mitigation technique, but not both?
items.notes: Uses an exclusive-or comparison within the annotation-support region.

items.question_en: Which combinations of release format and dataset location type are shared by at least two papers?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?releaseFormat ?releaseFormatLabel ?locationType ?locationTypeLabel
       (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
       (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?paperLabel; SEPARATOR=" | ") AS ?papers)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P181049 ?releaseFormat .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?datasetLocation .
  ?datasetLocation orkgp:P181030 ?locationType .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
  OPTIONAL { ?releaseFormat rdfs:label ?releaseFormatLabel . }
  OPTIONAL { ?locationType rdfs:label ?locationTypeLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?releaseFormat ?releaseFormatLabel ?locationType ?locationTypeLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) >= 2)
ORDER BY DESC(?paperCount) ?releaseFormatLabel ?locationTypeLabel
items.notes: Compares joint release-vs-dataset-location patterns shared by multiple papers.

items.question_en: Which venues report papers with more than one distinct dataset natural language?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?venue ?venueLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?naturalLanguage) AS ?languageCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P135046 ?venue ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType .
  ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?naturalLanguage .
  OPTIONAL { ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?venue ?venueLabel
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?naturalLanguage) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?languageCount) ?venueLabel
items.notes: Compares venues by the variety of dataset natural languages reported in their papers.

items.question_en: How many distinct NLP task output types are reported per RE task?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?reTask ?reTaskLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?outputType) AS ?outputTypeCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181002 ?reTask ;
                orkgp:P181003 ?nlpTask .
  ?nlpTask orkgp:P181006 ?taskOutput .
  ?taskOutput orkgp:P181007 ?outputType .
  OPTIONAL { ?reTask rdfs:label ?reTaskLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?reTask ?reTaskLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?outputTypeCount) ?reTaskLabel
items.notes: Counts task-output diversity for each RE-task value.

items.question_en: How many distinct venues report each RE task?
items.notes: Provides a corpus-level venue spread for each RE-task value.

items.question_en: How many papers report each guideline availability value?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?guidelineAvailability ?guidelineAvailabilityLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181036 ?annotationScheme .
  ?annotationScheme orkgp:P181038 ?guidelineAvailability .
  OPTIONAL { ?guidelineAvailability rdfs:label ?guidelineAvailabilityLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?guidelineAvailability ?guidelineAvailabilityLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?paperCount) ?guidelineAvailabilityLabel
items.notes: Counts the corpus frequency of guideline-availability values.

items.question_en: For each release format, how many distinct documentation types are reported?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?releaseFormat ?releaseFormatLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?documentationType) AS ?documentationTypeCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181046 ?implementedApproach .
  ?implementedApproach orkgp:P41835 ?documentationType ;
                       orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P181049 ?releaseFormat .
  OPTIONAL { ?releaseFormat rdfs:label ?releaseFormatLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?releaseFormat ?releaseFormatLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?documentationTypeCount) ?releaseFormatLabel
items.notes: Aggregates documentation diversity for each release format.

items.question_en: For each publication year, how many distinct data source domains are reported?
items.sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?year (COUNT(DISTINCT ?domain) AS ?domainCount)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
         orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
                orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?dataSource .
  ?dataSource orkgp:P181020 ?domain .
}
GROUP BY ?year
ORDER BY ?year
items.notes: Counts source-domain variety over time.

items.question_en: Which papers have the largest number of distinct data source domains?
items.notes: Finds the corpus maximum for per-paper source-domain breadth using a subquery.

items.question_en: Which venue has the highest number of papers that provide a release URL?
items.notes: Ranks venues by released-implementation URL coverage and returns the top venue or ties.

items.question_en: What is the maximum number of distinct evaluation metrics reported by a single paper?
items.notes: Computes a corpus-level maximum over per-paper metric counts.

items.question_en: For each approach type, how many papers report it without a release URL?
items.notes: Counts unreleased-by-URL implementations per approach type.

items.question_en: Which publication year has the largest number of papers that report an annotation scheme?
items.notes: Finds the peak annotation-scheme reporting year via a max-over-year-counts subquery.
